parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $json.jobId || $json.job_id, topic: $('Orchestrator').first().json.topic, state: $('Publisher Decision').first().json.currentState, decision: $('Publisher Decision').first().json.publishDecision, confidence: $('Publisher Decision').first().json.confidence, sources: ($('Publisher Decision').first().json.sources || []).length, report: $('Publisher Decision').first().json.report, logs: $('Publisher Decision').first().json.logs }) }}
